description: Create a Carbon Capture and Storage (CCS) variant of a natural gas electricity generation process using the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip). Copy an existing natural gas electricity generation process and rename it to include 'CCS' or 'Carbon Capture'. In the new process, reduce the 'Carbon dioxide' (or 'Carbon dioxide, fossil') output emission to 10% of its original value and add a note to the process description regarding the retrofit. Save a report to ~/LCA_Results/ccs_retrofit_report.txt listing the original process name, the new process name, and the CO2 emission values before and after the modification.
